import sqlite3, json

conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
import py_compile, sys
files = [
    'app/routes/dashboard_helpers.py',
    'app/routes/listings.py',
    'app/routes/preferences_routes.py',
    'app/routes/admin_routes.py',
    'app/routes/ai_routes.py',
    'app/routes/agent_routes.py',
    'app/routes/tour_routes.py',
    'app/routes/dashboard.py',
    'app/migrations.py',
    'app/utils.py',
    'app/services/ai_context.py',
]
ok = 0
for f in files:
    try:
        py_compile.compile\(f, doraise=True\)
        ok += 1
    except py_compile.PyCompileError as e:
        print\(f'FAIL: {f} — {e}'\)
print\(f'{ok}/{len\(files\)} files compile OK'\)
" 2>&1)

import sqlite3, json
conn = sqlite3.connect\('instance/registry.db'\)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
row = conn.execute\('SELECT target_areas_json FROM sites WHERE site_key=\\"charlestonsc\\"'\).fetchone\(\)
if row and row['target_areas_json']:
    areas = json.loads\(row['target_areas_json']\)
    for name, zips in areas.items\(\):
        print\(f'  {name}: {zips}'\)
else:
    print\('No target_areas_json'\)
conn.close\(\)
")

import ast, sys
files = [
    'app/models.py',
    'app/migrations.py',
    'app/services/street_watch.py',
    'app/routes/watch_routes.py',
    'app/routes/dashboard.py',

    'app/scraper/pipeline.py',
]

        print\(f'OK: {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'SYNTAX ERROR: {f}: {e}'\)
        ok = False
sys.exit\(0 if ok else 1\)
")

Bash(cd D:/Projects/home_finder_agents_social && python -c "
from app import create_app
from app.services.registry import get_all_sites
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text
app = create_app\(\)
with app.app_context\(\):
    sites = get_all_sites\(\)
    for site in sites:
        key = site['site_key']
        eng = create_engine\(f'sqlite:///{site[\\"db_path\\"]}'\)
        with eng.connect\(\) as c:
            agents = c.execute\(text\('SELECT id, username, email FROM users WHERE role=\\"agent\\"'\)\).fetchall\(\)
            profiles = c.execute\(text\('SELECT user_id FROM agent_profiles'\)\).fetchall\(\)
            profile_uids = {r[0] for r in profiles}
            for a in agents:
                has = 'HAS profile' if a[0] in profile_uids else 'MISSING profile'
                print\(f'{key}: user_id={a[0]} username={a[1]} — {has}'\)
")
